omitted_declarations.policy_reference:
These data include:
• "User's email" - your unique email address.
• "Username" is a set of characters and/or numbers that are not yet used by another player in our Game, and which you can change
in your account yourself. You can specify the Username yourself, but this is optional. If you refuse to specify a Username, it will be
assigned randomly in an automatic manner.
• "User's Avatar" is an image or photo that you can, but are not required to upload to your account instead of the default avatar.
• "Information provided when contacting support" - information provided by you when contacting our support service, including
the nature of your problem, payments data and information about your account.
• "Information that you share in text chats" - information that is provided by you during communication with other players through
the messaging functionality in the Game.

As a Game developer, it is important to us to know how users interact with our Games in order to improve your user experience. We
and our partners (“Analytics Services") collect your Location Information, Device Information, Advertising IDs, and Login information
for analytics purposes for our Games. For example, we use this information to:
• assessment of the difficulty level of the Game,
• corrections of any errors in the Game,
• assessing the demographics of our users,
• determining the need to support a new type of Device for the Game.

Our legitimate interest is in analyzing your activity to make sure that the Game is
functioning properly, as well as to fix problems
and improve your future experience.

How are User's Name, User's Avatar and User's ID used?
Our Game does not require you to provide your real name or upload your own image. Having a User's Name and User's Avatar is
required, but if you do not want to provide them, they will be generated automatically. If you wish to personalize your account, you
have the option of providing us with a User's Name yourself, unless it is already used by another player in our Game. If you do this,
we will process your User's Name and User's Avatar, but you can delete or change them at any time. Also, to minimize the personal
data we process, we assign a User's ID to your account.

As we do not collect the data when you make in-app purchases within our Game directly, in order to better process you refund
requests we have to obtain your consent for this data collection and processing as well as for transfer thereof to our payment's
agents.

• "Location Information" - general information about your location (without information about the exact geolocation) at the time
when you are playing Game (for example, IP address, country and city).

In order to serve you ads that may be of interest to you ("Targeted Advertising"), Advertising Partners collect and use your
Advertising ID, Location Information, and Device Information. If location services are enabled in your Device settings, Advertising
partners may additionally collect data about your geolocation.

Our Game does not require you to provide your real name or upload your own image. Having a User's Name and User's Avatar is required, but if you do not want to provide them, they will be generated automatically. If you wish to personalize your account, you have the option of providing us with a User's Name yourself, unless it is already used by another player in our Game. If you do this, we will process your User's Name and User's Avatar, but you can delete or change them at any time. Also, to minimize the personal data we process, we assign a User's ID to your account.
